title: Ixll language
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''language''' of the [[Ixll]]—small avian creatures native to [[Da Soocha V]]—consisted of high-pitched chirps, clicks, and whistles that traveled long distances in the thin atmosphere. The language was capable of reprogramming [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]].

{{Language-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]] {{1st}}
*[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]]
*[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]
